segments.text: If there arise among you a prophet, or a dreamer of dreams, and giveth thee a sign or a wonder
Let us go after other gods, which thou hast not known, and let us serve them
segments.speaker: Unknown Prophet/Dreamer

segments.text: Thou shalt not hearken unto the words of that prophet, or that dreamer of dreams: for the LORD your God proveth you, to know whether ye love the LORD your God with all your heart and with all your soul
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Ye shall walk after the LORD your God, and fear him, and keep his commandments, and obey his voice, and ye shall serve him, and cleave unto him
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And that prophet, or that dreamer of dreams, shall be put to death; because he hath spoken to turn you away from the LORD your God, which brought you out of the land of Egypt, and redeemed you out of the house of bondage, to thrust thee out of the way which the LORD thy God commanded thee to walk in. So shalt thou put the evil away from the midst of thee

footnotes: to turn…: Heb. revolt against the LORD

segments.text: Let us go and serve other gods, which thou hast not known, thou, nor thy fathers
segments.speaker: Family Member/Friend

segments.text: Namely, of the gods of the people which are round about you, nigh unto thee, or far off from thee, from the one end of the earth even unto the other end of the earth
Thou shalt not consent unto him, nor hearken unto him; neither shall thine eye pity him, neither shalt thou spare, neither shalt thou conceal him
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But thou shalt surely kill him; thine hand shall be first upon him to put him to death, and afterwards the hand of all the people
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And thou shalt stone him with stones, that he die; because he hath sought to thrust thee away from the LORD thy God, which brought thee out of the land of Egypt, from the house of bondage
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And all Israel shall hear, and fear, and shall do no more any such wickedness as this is among you
If thou shalt hear say in one of thy cities, which the LORD thy God hath given thee to dwell there, saying
Let us go and serve other gods, which ye have not known
segments.speaker: Children of Belial

segments.text: Then shalt thou enquire, and make search, and ask diligently; and, behold, if it be truth, and the thing certain, that such abomination is wrought among you
Thou shalt surely smite the inhabitants of that city with the edge of the sword, destroying it utterly, and all that is therein, and the cattle thereof, with the edge of the sword
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And thou shalt gather all the spoil of it into the midst of the street thereof, and shalt burn with fire the city, and all the spoil thereof every whit, for the LORD thy God: and it shall be an heap for ever; it shall not be built again
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And there shall cleave nought of the cursed thing to thine hand: that the LORD may turn from the fierceness of his anger, and shew thee mercy, and have compassion upon thee, and multiply thee, as he hath sworn unto thy fathers
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When thou shalt hearken to the voice of the LORD thy God, to keep all his commandments which I command thee this day, to do that which is right in the eyes of the LORD thy God
segments.speaker: God
